name: Kimpton AI
long_description:
Kimpton is an AI-native investment research platform built by ex-quant fund operators. 

Instead of analysts staring at screens hunting for edge, Kimpton's system is a comprehensive agentic harness containing the context that matters to investors: real-time and historical data across 120,000+ assets, company fundamentals fragmented intelligence sources, and your actual portfolio from 2,500+ brokerages. 

It conducts the research autonomously: visualizing, backtesting, forecasting with prediction markets, and proposing structured trades tailored to your thesis and risk profile. 

Built by former hedge fund operators who spent years building this stack for themselves, Kimpton makes the CIO role accessible to every investor. Humans make the decisions. AI does everything else.
